name: Maine Science Assessment Technical Report Spring 2024
summary: Official Spring 2024 Maine Science Assessment technical report. Chapter 4 describes machine-scored items in the ADAM platform and states that reviewing simulated student responses and machine-scored output is native to the item authoring/review process and helps ensure scoring accuracy.

access_attempts.notes: PDF retrieved from Maine DOE and text extracted locally. Relevant passage is in Chapter 4, Section 4.1, page 30 of 289.
